conflict: Anika's shin pain escalates and medical advice contradicts Ravi's no-excuses approach.
consequence: Anika conceals symptoms from adults and deepens the injury risk, binding herself to a lie that will later remove choice.
must_land_beats: Pain appears in warm-up and worsens during lunges.
School nurse recommends imaging and temporary rest.
Ravi reframes rest as weakness and lost opportunity.
Anika edits her symptom log to hide severity.
objective: Prepare for city qualifiers while keeping training volume high.
